message.content:
You need to replace ALL hardcoded French text in `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\pages\Home.tsx` with i18n translation keys.

This is a MASSIVE file (~880 lines) with dozens of hardcoded French strings. Work systematically section by section.

## RULES:
- Read the file first
- Import `useTranslation` from `../i18n/context`
- Add `const { t } = useTranslation();` at the start of the component (after the state declarations)
- Replace EVERY French string with the matching `t.*` key
- Move inline arrays (plans, testimonials, stats, etc.) inside the component
- Keep all existing functionality/logic intact
- DO NOT change styling or layout

## KEY MAPPINGS:

### HERO SECTION:
- `'Plateforme AEO / GEO'` → `t.home.badge`
- `'Analysez & Optimisez'` → `t.home.title`
- `'votre présence dans les'` → `t.home.titleLine2`
- `'résultats de recherche IA'` → `t.home.titleAccent`
- The subtitle paragraph → `t.home.subtitle`
- `'Lancer un Audit Gratuit'` → `t.home.launchFreeAudit`
- `'Explorer l\'Annuaire'` → `t.home.ctaSecondary`

### AEO/GEO SECTION:
- `'Qu\'est-ce que l\''` → `t.home.whatIsAeo`
- The explanation paragraph → `t.home.aeoExplain`
- `'SEO classique'` → `t.home.seoClassic`
- SEO card title → `t.home.seoDesc`
- SEO card description → `t.home.seoGoal`
- SEO metric → `t.home.seoMetric`
- `'AEO / GEO'` → `t.home.aeoGeo`
- AEO card title → `t.home.aeoDesc`
- AEO card description → `t.home.aeoGoal`
- AEO metric → `t.home.aeoMetric`

### 6 ENGINE CARDS:
Use `t.engines.*` keys:
- Replace inline engine array with translation keys: `t.engines.chatgpt`, `t.engines.chatgptDesc`, etc.

### CONCLUSION:
- `'CitedBy.ai vous donne le score AEO...'` → `t.home.citedbyGives`
- `'Analyser mon site →'` → `t.home.analyzeMySite`

### FREE AUDIT SECTION:
- `'100% GRATUIT'` → `t.home.freeLabel`
- `'Sans inscription'` → `t.home.noSignup`
- `'Votre Score de Visibilité IA'` → `t.home.scoreTitle`
- The subtitle → `t.home.scoreSubtitle`
- `'Nom de marque'` → `t.home.brandLabel`
- `'URL du site'` → `t.home.urlLabel`
- Error messages: `t.home.fillBothFields`, `t.home.invalidUrl`
- `'Analyse en cours...'` → `t.analysis.analyzing`
- `'Créer un compte pour continuer'` → `t.home.ctaUsed`
- `'Analyser gratuitement'` → `t.home.cta`
- No card text → `t.home.noCard`

### RESULTS SECTION (inside Home):
- `'GRATUIT'` tag → `t.analysis.freeTag`
- `'Piliers E-E-A-T'` → `t.analysis.eeatPillars`
- `'Synthèse'` → `t.analysis.synthesis`
- `'Recommandations prioritaires'` → `t.analysis.priorityRecs`
- `'Débloquez l\'analyse complète'` → `t.analysis.unlockFullAnalysis`
- The description → `t.analysis.unlockFullDesc`
- CTA button → `t.analysis.createAccountCta`
- `'Scan en cours...'` → `t.analysis.scanInProgress`
- `'Nous interrogeons les LLMs...'` → `t.analysis.scanSubtitle`
- Score labels (getScoreLabel function): use `t.analysis.scoreExcellent`, etc.

### STATS BAR:
Replace the stats array items:
- `{ value: '50%', label: t.home.statSearches, sublabel: t.home.statSearchesSub }`
- `{ value: '24h', label: t.home.statTime, sublabel: t.home.statTimeSub }`
- `{ value: '0', label: t.home.statClick, sublabel: t.home.statClickSub }`
- `{ value: '3x', label: t.home.statConversions, sublabel: t.home.statConversionsSub }`

### FEATURES GRID:
- Title → `t.home.featuresTitle` and `t.home.featuresSubtitle`
- Feature items → `t.home.featureSimulator`, `t.home.featureSimulatorDesc`, etc.

### SEO vs AEO COMPARISON:
- `'Le Changement de Paradigme'` → `t.home.paradigmTitle`
- Subtitle → `t.home.paradigmSubtitle`
- `'SEO Classique'` → `t.home.seoClassic`
- SEO list items → `t.home.seoPoints[0]`, `t.home.seoPoints[1]`, etc.
- `'AEO & GEO'` → `t.home.aeoGeo`
- `'Le Futur'` → `t.home.futureLabel`
- AEO list items → `t.home.aeoPoints[0]`, `t.home.aeoPoints[1]`, etc.

### 3 PILLARS:
- Title → `t.home.pillarsTitle`, `t.home.pillarsSubtitle`
- Pillars → `t.home.pillar1Title`, `t.home.pillar1Desc`, etc.

### PROCESS:
- `'Votre parcours d\'optimisation'` → `t.home.processTitle`
- Steps → `t.home.step1Title`, `t.home.step1Desc`, etc.

### TESTIMONIALS:
- Title → `t.home.testimonialsTitle`, `t.home.testimonialsSubtitle`
- The actual testimonial quotes can stay hardcoded (they're fake/demo data)

### PRICING:
- Badge → `t.home.pricingBadge`
- Title → `t.home.pricingTitle`
- Subtitle → `t.home.pricingSubtitle`
- `'Le Choix Expert'` → `t.home.expertChoice`
- Plans features array items (stay same as they're product names)
- CTA buttons: `t.home.rechargeLabel` / `t.home.createAccount`
- `'Crédits Gas'` → `t.home.creditsGasLabel`

Work through the file section by section. This is a big task but critical.
